cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

new: this arcanist from another dark reality is a plague on our reality.
This magician never lets go of the animal rage that inhabits him.
this magician has strange magical abilities.
This mage probably comes from a manga: he knows only one spell.
This mage studies the power of fusions more than any other.
This mage swears by spherical things.
This arcanist has two passions: making little burnt holes and slicing grilled heads.
This mage was born with a unique gift: an innate knowledge of universal magic.
this magician sought to gain power by making a pact with a demon lord, without measuring the consequences.
This being from another reality knows how to extract vital energy from the beings around him, turning it...
This being from another reality knows how to extract vital energy from the beings around him, turning it...
this sorcerer has a very strange way of using magic.
this amalgam of incarneted magic comes from another reality and reacts strangely to the laws of the known...
this amalgam of incarneted magic comes from another reality and reacts strangely to the laws of the known...
This agglomeration of tiny fairies comes from another reality and can accomplish great things by group effect.
This agglomeration of tiny fairies comes from another reality and can accomplish great things by group effect.
this very strange sorcerer practices magic differently.
Sorcerer wielding mirror and reflection magic from another reality.
This arcanist loves fighting so much that he spends more time doing it than mastering magic.
This arcanist comes from another reality and survives with difficulty in the known reality.
This very strange arcanist draws his magic from every possible source, using only his conscience to cast...
This sorcerer is literally bursting with magical energy.
this cleric comes from elsewhere and knows only magic, which he uses in a very unusual way.
This cleric from another reality is subject to other rules.
This priest from another reality defies the laws of our own.
this priest from another reality behaves strangely.
This evil being comes from another reality.
This beneficent being comes from another reality.
This beneficent being comes from another reality.
This cleric from another reality follows other divine rules.
This mortal worships his god in a different way and receives a different kind of divine help.
This arcanist from another reality knows how to use the energy released by gods and nature.
This druid is an outsider from an elemental plane.
This druid is an outsider from an elemental plane.
This druid is a large, ever-growing blister from another universe.
This druid is so obsessed with minions that he forgets everything else.
This elementalist has no planar connection and doesn't need one.
This protoplasmic vase assembly can simulate all forms of life.
Bard whose songs directly channel and shape arcane spell energy.
Bard manipulating time through song. Haste, slow, and temporal abilities.
this bard has some really funny imaginary friends.
Bard following the chaos squirrel. Unpredictable chaos and mischief magic.
this singer comes from a reality where magic is abhorred.
this unusual bard is a dangerous blessing.
this bard is the embodiment of elemental chaos.
Bard whose songs channel life force. Healing and resurrection melodies.
this "bard" isn't really a bard: he doesn't sing or cast spells.
This bard knows a family secret that it's best not to tell too much to the defenders of good.
This bard comes from a world where magic does not exist.
This shaman doesn't need to call spirits: they're with him all the time.
This shaman doesn't call spirits but nightmares, and they don't like it.
Shaman who grows stronger through combat damage. Heals through fighting spirit.
Chaotic fighter with completely random abilities. Unpredictable combat effects.
This warrior doesn't intend to learn anything, he just relies on his luck.
This warrior loves killing so much it drives him mad.
This paladin uses unorthodox resources to preserve the balance.
This paladin comes from a faraway land where the rules are different.
This druid's link with nature is very strong, but it doesn't manifest itself in the same way as that of...
This order of monks undergo rigorous training to become God's hammers.
This arcanist infuses the magic he doesn't need into his weapon.
This arcanist seeks by all means to know all forms of magic, and better still, to draw new power from...

sum: 63 wacky kits across all classes: mages, sorcerers, clerics, druids, bards, shamans, warriors, paladins, monks. Each individually selectable, some with animation variants.

passive.desc: Mage. this arcanist from another dark reality is a plague on our reality.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Limited to Evocation+Necromancy. All spells/abilities restore every round. Evil required.

statBonus.note: Evil alignment required.

passive.desc: Mage. This magician never lets go of the animal rage that inhabits him.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Improved Alacrity on each kill, +15% damage. Berserk below 25% HP.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky mage kit (ENRAGED). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Mage. this magician has strange magical abilities.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Steals memorized spells from enemy arcanists at will. Fewer spell slots and delayed level access.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky mage kit (SPELL_STEALER). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Mage. This mage probably comes from a manga: he knows only one spell.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Knows ONLY Magic Missile (cast at will, scaling missiles up to 11). Cannot learn any other spells.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky mage kit (MANGACIAN). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Bard. A once-in-a-millennium exception.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Damage tripled. Fixed 1 HP/level, -50% all resistances, -4 saves.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky bard kit (LEGENDARY_SINGULARITY). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Mage. This mage studies the power of fusions more than any other.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Combines 2-3 spells for +35% damage/duration.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky mage kit (MASTER_COMBINER). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Mage. This mage swears by spherical things.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Two orb/sphere spells per level castable infinitely. Cannot learn other spells or use scrolls.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky mage kit (SPHEROMANIAC). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Mage. This arcanist has two passions: making little burnt holes and slicing grilled heads.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Creates 20-50 Melf's Meteors and 30-50 Energy Blades. +1 THAC0/5 levels with projectiles.

statBonus.note: Cannot be Good aligned.

passive.desc: Mage. This mage was born with a unique gift: an innate knowledge of universal magic.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Models any spell of corresponding level instead of learning. Casts HLAs as L9 from level 23. Loses 1 HP per spell modeled.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky mage kit (SPELL_MODELER). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Mage. this magician sought to gain power by making a pact with a demon lord, without measuring t

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: +3 spells per level, max casting time 6, D6 HD. Each kill deals 1d4 non-lethal to entire party.

statBonus.note: -3 WIS, D6 HD.

passive.desc: Mage. This being from another reality knows how to extract vital energy from the beings around h

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Models arcane+divine+quest spells. +2 slots/level. Spell modeling drains HP from nearby creatures.

statBonus.note: Evil alignment required.

passive.desc: Mage. This being from another reality knows how to extract vital energy from the beings around h

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Models arcane+divine+quest spells. +2 slots/level. Spell modeling drains HP from nearby creatures.

statBonus.note: Evil alignment required.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. this sorcerer has a very strange way of using magic.

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: All spells restore after combat ends. 3 fewer slots/level, delayed access, unaffected by spell storage.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky sorcerer kit (EORATIAN). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. this amalgam of incarneted magic comes from another reality and reacts strangely to the la

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: 100% magic resistance. Immune to poison/disease/level drain. +2 HP per cast. Uses wild magic, no conventional spells.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky sorcerer kit (ANOMALY_SORCERER_WITH_ANIMATION). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. this amalgam of incarneted magic comes from another reality and reacts strangely to the la

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: 100% magic resistance. Immune to poison/disease/level drain. +2 HP per cast. Uses wild magic.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky sorcerer kit (ANOMALY_SORCERER_WITHOUT_ANIMATION). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. This agglomeration of tiny fairies comes from another reality and can accomplish great thi

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Doubled spell slots. +2 AC, Protection from Normal Weapons. Cannot carry items or take physical form.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky sorcerer kit (MAGIC_MINUIMS_SORCERER_WITH_ANIMATION). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. This agglomeration of tiny fairies comes from another reality and can accomplish great thi

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Doubled spell slots. +2 AC, Protection from Normal Weapons. Cannot carry items.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky sorcerer kit (MAGIC_MINUIMS_SORCERER_WITHOUT_ANIMATION). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. this very strange sorcerer practices magic differently.

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: +50% spell duration, +50% elemental/magic damage, +4 caster level. Casting time +3.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky sorcerer kit (INCANTATOR). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. Sorcerer wielding mirror and reflection magic from another reality.

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Unlimited Spell Turning. +3 AC via light reflection. Unlimited Reflected Image. -50% HP, -100% crushing resist.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky sorcerer kit (SPIRIT_OF_THE_MIRROR). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. This arcanist loves fighting so much that he spends more time doing it than mastering magi

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Fighter/mage hybrid sorcerer with weapon proficiencies, half-attack bonuses.

statBonus.note: D6 HD, -15% XP, no ranged weapons.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. This arcanist comes from another reality and survives with difficulty in the known reality

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: +10 movement, +1 APR, -4 casting time, Improved Alacrity, +3 saves vs wands/breath. Loses 1 HP/3 sec when idle.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky sorcerer kit (ZAP). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. This very strange arcanist draws his magic from every possible source, using only his cons

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Rememorizes spells every 3 rounds. Permanent Spell Trap. Recalls spells on kills. Fixed cast time 1. Loses all spells if unconscious.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky sorcerer kit (PSYCHO_ABSORBER). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. This sorcerer is literally bursting with magical energy.

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: All attacks add 1d4 magic damage with scaling effects (Slow/Stun/Hold/Disintegrate). +15% spell duration/damage. 15% miscast chance.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky sorcerer kit (OVERFLOWER). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Cleric. this cleric comes from elsewhere and knows only magic, which he uses in a very unusual way

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Doubled spell slots. Improved Alacrity. Max casting time 5. Uses mage THAC0 and hit dice.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky cleric kit (DWEOMERIST). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Cleric. This cleric from another reality is subject to other rules.

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Spells restore after combat. Max 5 slots/level. 5% Wild Surge chance per spell.

statBonus.note: Chaotic alignment required.

passive.desc: Cleric. This priest from another reality defies the laws of our own.

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Casts Limited Wish at will (L9), Wish at will (L18). No L6-7 spells, no HLAs.

statBonus.note: -2 WIS. BG2EE/EET only.

passive.desc: Cleric. this priest from another reality behaves strangely.

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Gains half-attack per 4 levels (max +4 APR bonus).

statBonus.note: D4 hit die.

passive.desc: Cleric. This evil being comes from another reality.

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Instant-kill spells memorized at lower levels. +5 HP per kill. 2% chance to kill on hit. No resurrection/healing.

statBonus.note: Evil alignment required.

passive.desc: Cleric. This beneficent being comes from another reality.

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Doubled HP and Turn Undead levels. Healing spells at lower level with cast time 1. No summons/wound spells.

statBonus.note: Good alignment required.

passive.desc: Cleric. This beneficent being comes from another reality.

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Doubled HP and Turn Undead levels. Healing spells at lower level with cast time 1. No summons/wound spells.

statBonus.note: Good alignment required.

passive.desc: Cleric. This cleric from another reality follows other divine rules.

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Healing spells automatically recast on self. Uses mage THAC0.

statBonus.note: Good alignment required.

passive.desc: Cleric. This mortal worships his god in a different way and receives a different kind of divine he

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Cannot cast spells. Aid/Bless/DUHM bonuses scale every 6 levels. Warrior HLAs.

statBonus.note: +2 CHA.

passive.desc: Cleric. This arcanist from another reality knows how to use the energy released by gods and nature

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Models any divine spell (including druidic) per level. Casts HLAs as L7 from level 22. +1 cast time.

statBonus.note: -3 slots/level, D6 HD.

passive.desc: Druid. This druid is an outsider from an elemental plane.

hlaPool.note: Standard druid HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: 125% fire resist. Immune to normal/+1 weapons. Extra fire spells. +5% fire damage/level.

statBonus.note: Cannot carry objects. Cold vulnerable.

passive.desc: Druid. This druid is an outsider from an elemental plane.

hlaPool.note: Standard druid HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: 125% fire resist. Immune to normal/+1 weapons. Extra fire spells.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky druid kit (PYROCLASM_DRUID_WITHOUT_ANIMATION). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Druid. This druid is a large, ever-growing blister from another universe.

hlaPool.note: Standard druid HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: DAWAP wacky druid kit. See passive description for unique mechanic.

statBonus.note: +1 STR/DEX/CON and -1 INT/WIS/CHA every 5 levels. 5% chance per round when damaged to self-destruct for 10d10.

passive.desc: Druid. This druid is so obsessed with minions that he forgets everything else.

hlaPool.note: Standard druid HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Animal and elemental summons doubled in effect. Cannot learn healing/regeneration spells.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky druid kit (HORDE_SPIRIT). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Druid. This elementalist has no planar connection and doesn't need one.

hlaPool.note: Standard druid HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Knows 20 elemental spells (clerical+arcane). Doubled elemental resistance. No summons.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky druid kit (RAVAGER). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Druid. This protoplasmic vase assembly can simulate all forms of life.

hlaPool.note: Standard druid HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Cannot cast spells. 25% crushing resist. All Polymorph/Shapechange forms at will (level-gated).

statBonus.note: No HLAs. D12 HD.

passive.desc: Bard. Bard whose songs directly channel and shape arcane spell energy.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Song lets allies recall spells (L1 + 1 per 4 levels). Song costs 1-3 HP depending on spell levels recalled.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky bard kit (SPELLSINGER). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Bard. Bard manipulating time through song. Haste, slow, and temporal abilities.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Song imposes Slow on enemies and Haste on allies. +1 fatigue per round of singing.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky bard kit (TEMPUS_FUGIUM). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Bard. this bard has some really funny imaginary friends.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Song has 15% chance to invoke nishruu. 10% cast chance and 1% song chance to spawn hostile nishruu.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky bard kit (NISHRUUNOAM). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Bard. Bard following the chaos squirrel. Unpredictable chaos and mischief magic.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Song turns failed-save enemies into squirrels. Singer also risks squirrel transformation on failed save.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky bard kit (DISCIPLE_OF_RATATOSKR). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Bard. this singer comes from a reality where magic is abhorred.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Song dispels magic (100%), 15% spell failure, -10% MR on targets, 40% own MR. Affects allies too. -30% own spell power.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky bard kit (ANTIMAGINUM). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Bard. this unusual bard is a dangerous blessing.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Song grants allies Improved Alacrity and +15% MR while singing. 20% chance spells explode for 10d10 damage.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky bard kit (MAGIVORE). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Bard. this bard is the embodiment of elemental chaos.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Song applies Sphere of Chaos effects to enemies. Crits trigger Sphere effects. Immune to confusion. Spells cause Wild Surges.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky bard kit (CRUW_OF_CHAOS). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Bard. Bard whose songs channel life force. Healing and resurrection melodies.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Song heals 1-3 HP/round. 1%/level chance to cure poison/disease.

statBonus.note: Good only. BG2EE/EET only.

passive.desc: Bard. this "bard" isn't really a bard: he doesn't sing or cast spells.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Cannot cast spells. Song stacks Power Word effects (Sleep L1 through Destruction L30).

statBonus.note: +2 CHA. Cannot be Chaotic/Good.

passive.desc: Bard. This bard knows a family secret that it's best not to tell too much to the defenders of go

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Song raises dead as zombies (20%+1%/level). Zombies scale with HD.

statBonus.note: Evil only. BG2EE/EET only.

passive.desc: Bard. This bard comes from a world where magic does not exist.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Cannot cast spells. Song creates Sunfire (1d4/level fire, max 20d4). Melee adds 1d4-5d4 fire/5 levels. Fire resist scales.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky bard kit (FIRESINGER). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Shaman. This shaman doesn't need to call spirits: they're with him all the time.

hlaPool.note: Standard shaman HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: DAWAP wacky shaman kit. See passive description for unique mechanic.

statBonus.note: +1 AC/saves, +2 HP, +5% MR per 6 levels. +1 all stats/10 levels. Dance creates Bless/Chant/Defensive Harmony.

passive.desc: Shaman. This shaman doesn't call spirits but nightmares, and they don't like it.

hlaPool.note: Standard shaman HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Knows Sleep/Horror/Phantasmal Killer. Dance creates Phantasmal Killers (20%+2%/level). 1%/level chance of nightmare attack after rest.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky shaman kit (NIGHTMARE_STORYTELLER). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Shaman. Shaman who grows stronger through combat damage. Heals through fighting spirit.

hlaPool.note: Standard shaman HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Knows destruction spells (MM through Energy Blades). Dance grants +15% damage/-1 cast time cumulative. Fist scales 1d6-2d12 (1.5-5 APR).

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky shaman kit (SAIYAN_HEALER). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Fighter. Chaotic fighter with completely random abilities. Unpredictable combat effects.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). DAWAP wacky kits.

statBonus.note: DAWAP wacky fighter kit (4TR4ND0M). See passive description for stat modifiers.

passive.desc: Fighter. Quick, quick, quick....

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). DAWAP wacky kits.

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). DAWAP wacky kits.

statBonus.note: Thief THAC0. No HLAs.

passive.desc: Fighter. This warrior loves killing so much it drives him mad.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). DAWAP wacky kits.

statBonus.note: Evil only.

passive.desc: Paladin. This paladin uses unorthodox resources to preserve the balance.

hlaPool.note: Standard paladin HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: +2 spells/level. Knows profane spells from Evo/Trans/Ench.

statBonus.note: Neutral alignment. Studded leather only. No ranged.

passive.desc: Paladin. This paladin comes from a faraway land where the rules are different.

hlaPool.note: Standard paladin HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Higher-level spells in place of lower. Doubled slots. -2 cast time. Staff mastery.

statBonus.note: Limited weapons. No Turn Undead.

passive.desc: Ranger. This druid's link with nature is very strong, but it doesn't manifest itself in the same w

hlaPool.note: Standard ranger HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: No spells. Charm wild animals permanently at will (woodland L10, exotic L20).

statBonus.note: Studded leather only. No dual-class.

passive.desc: Monk. This order of monks undergo rigorous training to become God's hammers.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: No spellcasting (class default). DAWAP wacky kits.

statBonus.note: LG only. No MR/movement bonuses. No Quivering Palm.

passive.desc: Fighter. This arcanist infuses the magic he doesn't need into his weapon.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (DAWAP wacky kits often have unique mechanics; see passive).

spellRestrictions.note: Auto-becomes C/M. Shared spells at lower level. Druidic equivalents. 10% "Arcanic Luck" per cast.

no: 63 wacky kits across all classes: mages, sorcerers, clerics, druids, bards, shamans, warriors, paladins, monks. Each individually selectable, some with animation variants.
